config.interfaces:
<#if cc\-name?has_content> ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI <#elseif ibridge\-user\-port\-name?has_content> ${ibridge\-user\-port\-name}-VSI </#if>
${enable\-ipv4\-security} <#if learn\-addresses\-from\-dhcp?has_content> <#if learn\-addresses\-from\-dhcp == true>
<#else>
</#if> </#if> <#if enable\-ipv4\-security == true && max\-address?has_content> ${max\-address} <#elseif enable\-ipv4\-security == false>
</#if>
<#if ipv4\-security\-statistics?has_content> <#if ipv4\-security\-statistics == true>
<#if cc\-name?has_content> ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI <#elseif ibridge\-user\-port\-name?has_content> ${ibridge\-user\-port\-name}-VSI </#if>
<#else>
<#if cc\-name?has_content> ${cc\-name}-USER-VSI <#elseif ibridge\-user\-port\-name?has_content> ${ibridge\-user\-port\-name}-VSI </#if>
</#if> </#if>
